title: Added Google Analytics to the site
body: We now track page views and referral sources so we can see which skills people are finding and where they're coming from. No personal data is collected — just aggregate traffic patterns.

title: Skill pages now show compatibility status
body: Each skill page now shows which sites currently work and which don't. The photo scraper works on Redfin, Zillow, and Compass. Realtor.com is currently blocked by Claude's browser extension — we're monitoring it and the page will update when that changes.

title: Repositioned every page on the site
body: Rewrote the homepage, skill pages, contact page, nav, and footer. The new message: every skill took days of testing to get right — you get the version that works on the first try. Cut the generic 'AI tools' framing and leaned into what actually matters: these are battle-tested, not just clever prompts.

title: Redfin Estimate Accuracy Checker
body: New skill for home buyers and agents. Paste an active Redfin listing and it checks how accurate Redfin's estimate has been on nearby homes that already sold — so you know whether to trust the number before making an offer.

title: Split Redfin tools into two distinct skills
body: The original Redfin Estimate Checker only worked on sold properties. We split it into two: one for active listings (the new Accuracy Checker) and one for off-market/sold properties. Each now has copy and instructions that match its actual use case.

title: Redfin Estimate Checker
body: Compare what Redfin predicted for sold homes against the actual sale prices. Paste a Redfin URL and the skill does the math — tells you how far off the estimate was.

title: Category filters on the homepage
body: You can now filter skills by category (Real Estate, Business, etc.) on the homepage. Helps when we have more than three skills.

title: Skill pages got clearer setup instructions
body: Every skill page now walks you through one-time setup (Claude desktop app, Cowork mode, Chrome extension) plus how to install and use the specific skill — step by step.

title: thebotcandoit.com is live
body: The site launched with one skill: Real Estate Photo Scraper. Download every photo from a Redfin, Zillow, Compass, or Realtor.com listing in one click.
